title: Design System Tokens
content: Design tokens defined as CSS custom properties: --color-primary, --color-surface, --spacing-xs through --spacing-xl, --radius-sm/md/lg, --shadow-card/modal. Tokens change between light and dark themes. Font scale: 12/14/16/20/24/32px mapped to text-xs through text-3xl. Consistent 8px grid for spacing. All components reference tokens, never hardcoded values.
